hyperedges.label: Cross-Platform Parity Contract: Flutter golden reference → product-spec → native clients
AI Enrichment Pipeline: ClaudeService (Flutter/Android/iOS) → claude-sonnet-4-6 → plan enrichment
Offline-First Design: local rule engine mandatory, backend optional, storage encrypted where possible

nodes.label: Draw a thick line using filled circles along Bresenham steps.
nodes.norm_label: draw a thick line using filled circles along bresenham steps.

nodes.label: Scaled point relative to canvas centre.
nodes.norm_label: scaled point relative to canvas centre.

nodes.label: Rationale: hive_generator removed (analyzer conflict with Riverpod v3 + Flutter 3.41+)
nodes.norm_label: rationale: hive_generator removed (analyzer conflict with riverpod v3 + flutter 3.41+)

nodes.label: Rationale: hasCompletedOnboarding set after plan saved (not after form filled) to prevent redirect loops
nodes.norm_label: rationale: hascompletedonboarding set after plan saved (not after form filled) to prevent redirect loops

nodes.label: Web App Stack (React + Vite + TypeScript + Dexie)
nodes.norm_label: web app stack (react + vite + typescript + dexie)

nodes.label: iOS App Stack (Swift + SwiftUI + UserDefaults + Keychain)
nodes.norm_label: ios app stack (swift + swiftui + userdefaults + keychain)

nodes.label: Rationale: No SwiftData/CoreData — UserDefaults JSON blob keeps schema migrations simple
nodes.norm_label: rationale: no swiftdata/coredata — userdefaults json blob keeps schema migrations simple

nodes.label: Rationale: Flutter remains intentional golden reference (not accidental legacy)
nodes.norm_label: rationale: flutter remains intentional golden reference (not accidental legacy)

nodes.label: Rationale: offline-first mandatory — backend services are optional, not runtime-critical
nodes.norm_label: rationale: offline-first mandatory — backend services are optional, not runtime-critical

nodes.label: Rationale: Backend services are optional — no server dependency for core plan generation or offline use
nodes.norm_label: rationale: backend services are optional — no server dependency for core plan generation or offline use

nodes.label: Rationale: No DI framework (Hilt/Koin) — manual AppContainer keeps composition root simple
nodes.norm_label: rationale: no di framework (hilt/koin) — manual appcontainer keeps composition root simple

nodes.label: Rationale: MainActivity extends AppCompatActivity (not ComponentActivity) for locale switching on Android < 13
nodes.norm_label: rationale: mainactivity extends appcompatactivity (not componentactivity) for locale switching on android < 13

nodes.label: Rationale: Room stores plan as JSON blob (not normalized rows) to keep schema migrations simple during pilot
nodes.norm_label: rationale: room stores plan as json blob (not normalized rows) to keep schema migrations simple during pilot

hyperedges.label: Cross-Platform Parity Contract: Flutter golden reference → product-spec → native clients
AI Enrichment Pipeline: ClaudeService (Flutter/Android/iOS) → claude-sonnet-4-6 → plan enrichment
Offline-First Design: local rule engine mandatory, backend optional, storage encrypted where possible
